title: Partner Platform (B2P) Redesign
subtitle: Modernizing an outdated system to reduce manual work and improve partner experience
challenge: The Partner Platform (B2P) had grown organically over years into a fragmented, outdated system. Partners spent 3+ hours daily on manual data entry, and the lack of self-service capabilities forced support teams to handle routine requests. The system's complexity led to high error rates, partner frustration, and significant operational cost — requiring a full redesign that balanced partner needs with internal feasibility.

designProcess.intro: I led the end-to-end design process — from initial research through developer collaboration and testing. Close involvement of developers ensured feasibility while maintaining design integrity across the platform.

steps.title: Research & Discovery
steps.description: Led user mapping sessions, conducted stakeholder interviews across product, operations, and support teams, and facilitated workshops to understand partner pain points. Analyzed current workflows and identified bottlenecks through contextual inquiry.

steps.title: Strategy & Planning
steps.description: Conducted comprehensive impact mapping to understand business goals and user needs. Prioritized features based on strategic importance and developed a phased release plan that balanced quick wins with long-term platform improvements.

steps.title: Design & Testing
steps.description: Created interaction prototypes and conducted iterative testing with real partners. Close collaboration with developers ensured feasibility of designs while maintaining design integrity. Multiple rounds of user testing refined the experience.

insights: Partners spent 3+ hours daily on manual data entry, representing massive efficiency opportunity
Real-time visibility and intuitive dashboards transformed partner decision-making capability
Phased approach with quick wins enabled organizational momentum and partnership trust
Developer collaboration from the start prevented costly redesigns and improved feasibility

deliverables.intro: The redesigned Partner Platform featured an intuitive dashboard providing real-time insights, automated workflows eliminating manual tasks, streamlined information architecture, and seamless API integration. The new design system ensured consistency and scalability across the platform.

images.alt: Expanded design system - built with product portfolio in mind.

results.intro: The redesigned experience delivered measurable improvements across key metrics.
